command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/fix_hermes2.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
cd /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent
echo Y | /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/hermes gateway install 2>&1
echo install_done
sleep 5
systemctl --user status hermes-gateway 2>/dev/null | head -10
systemctl --user status hermes-agent 2>/dev/null | head -5
ss -tlnp | grep -E '9119|8080|3000'
SHEOF
bash /tmp/fix_hermes2.sh"
